reason: Backend guideline index for Python, validation, tests, lint, type-check, and file-based state conventions.
Needed to place queue/controller modules consistently with existing backend package layout.
Queue and agent-loop errors must surface through existing stream/protocol error patterns.
Queue/runner logging must avoid prompts, responses, secrets, and use project logging conventions.
Async queue behavior requires typed code and pytest coverage under project quality rules.
Reference architecture findings from the sibling claude-code project.
OpenHarness-specific integration points and constraints for queue plus agent loop implementation.
